case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ERNESTO M AREVALO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AREVALO, ERNESTO M $2,251.78 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,351.78 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
